message:
feat(parser,wasm): add Serialize derive to ParseResult, restructure WASM

fm-parser: Added Serialize derive to ParseResult struct enabling JSON
serialization of parse results for WASM API consumption. This allows
the JavaScript API to receive structured parse output including IR
and warnings.

fm-render-canvas: Extended canvas rendering library with 5-line
improvement for enhanced render pipeline.

fm-wasm: Restructured WASM crate (removed 34 lines from lib.rs,
added 7 lines to Cargo.toml) as part of WASM binding reorganization
for cleaner API surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,4 +12,11 @@ crate-type = ["cdylib", "rlib"]
 fm-core.workspace = true
 fm-layout.workspace = true
 fm-parser.workspace = true
+fm-render-canvas.workspace = true
 fm-render-svg.workspace = true
+js-sys.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde-wasm-bindgen.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+wasm-bindgen.workspace = true
+web-sys.workspace = true
